backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the chat app's backend with data types and methods for global messages, user profiles, friend requests, and message threads, protected by role-based access control via AccessControl and MixinAuthorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two high-confidence features: restoring the full ChatView layout (MessageFeed, FriendsPanel, VideoCallModal) and fixing ChatView's conditional rendering so the profile gate doesn't block the main UI after setup.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source files to short summaries describing each component's or hook's purpose, serving as a quick reference for the project's frontend structure.
frontend/index.css: Global stylesheet defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes (background, foreground, primary, sidebar, chart colors, etc.) applied via Tailwind's base layer.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with app title, meta description, Open Graph and Twitter Card tags for social sharing, favicon links, and the root div that mounts the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that simply renders ChatView as the sole page of the application.
frontend/src/components/ChatView.tsx: Main chat layout component handling authentication gating, profile loading, profile setup flow, public/private chat switching, friends sidebar, and video call modal overlay with tab-based mobile navigation.
frontend/src/components/DisplayNamePromp: Onboarding form component that lets new users enter a display name, auto-generates a username from it, calls the createUserProfile mutation, and invokes onComplete on success.
frontend/src/components/FriendListItem.t: Renders a single friend entry in the friends list with avatar, online status indicator, display name, and a video call button that appears on hover.
frontend/src/components/FriendRequestIte: Displays an incoming friend request with the requester's avatar and name, plus accept and decline action buttons that use mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/FriendsPanel.tsx: Full friends sidebar panel with a search input, tabbed sections for friends list and pending requests, and the ability to send friend requests to search results.
frontend/src/components/MessageFeed.tsx: Renders a scrollable list of global chat messages with color-coded avatars, distinguishing own messages from others, and auto-scrolls to the latest message.
frontend/src/components/MessageInput.tsx: Controlled text input form for composing and submitting global chat messages, with loading state and Enter-key support.
Private one-on-one chat view between the current user and a selected friend, showing message history, a send input, and a video call button in the header.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for first-time users to create their profile by entering a display name and username, with validation and error handling.
frontend/src/components/VideoCallModal.t: React modal component for an active video call, displaying a local video PiP, remote participant avatar, hidden remote audio element, and controls for mute, camera toggle, and ending the call.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, wrapping DFINITY's AuthClient to expose login, logout, and identity state to the React component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profile CRUD, messaging, and friend request operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useVideoCall.ts: Custom hook managing simulated video call state, including acquiring local media, creating a loopback remote audio stream, and handling mute/camera toggles and call lifecycle.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Tailwind and defining CSS custom property design tokens for a warm coral/amber theme in both light and dark modes, plus video call-specific tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with React Query's QueryClientProvider and the InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH colors, border radii, shadows, fonts, and accordion animations for the frontend app.
project_state.json: Tracks the project's current state (version 19) for a chat app with friends, private messaging, and video calling features, including known issues and existing feature history.
